text.title: Human-in-the-Loop Design Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the human-in-the-loop-design methodology.

example.title: Refund-agent HITL for refunds > $200
example.narrative: Refunds > $200 block until reviewer approves. UI shows AI-extracted facts, policy clause, prior-customer context. Reviewer signals (approve/deny/correct-fact) feed into weekly prompt refit + retrieval index.
example.artifact: hitl-spec.md with decision table + review UI + feedback loop.
